name: GymU
description: Gym progress tracker for iOS & Android with workout planning, live training mode, exercise recommendations and stats - built with React Native, Expo, Node.js, Python & PostgreSQL, containerized with Docker

name: Elevator System
description: Real-time elevator system simulator featuring a custom finite state machine algorithm for optimal floor scheduling, built with Java Spring & React

name: Differential Equations FEM
description: Finite Element Method solver for a differential equation with mixed boundary conditions, written in Rust - made for Differential Equations course at AGH University

name: Observability Project
description: Distributed gRPC system in Python demonstrating observability with OpenTelemetry, Jaeger, Prometheus & Grafana - containerized with Docker

name: Digital Image Processing
description: Jupyter notebooks covering digital image processing techniques using Python, NumPy & OpenCV

name: AI Course
description: Jupyter notebooks covering ML fundamentals — regression, decision trees, neural networks, CNNs, NLP and recommendation systems

name: Numerical Methods Course
description: Numerical methods assignments and reports covering scientific computing algorithms and libraries, built with Python & NumPy.

name: Operating Systems Course
description: C assignments covering Unix-like OS mechanics - processes, signals, IPC and filesystems. Each scored full marks.

name: Assembly x86
description: MASM x86 projects from Assembly course - verbal calculator parsing word-form expressions and an ellipse renderer in graphics mode

name: Darwin Simulator
description: Darwinian evolution simulator built with Java & JavaFX, featuring configurable maps, animal behavior and natural selection mechanics - made for Object-Oriented Programming course

name: Algorithms and Data Structures
description: Algorithms and Data Structures homework solutions in Python.

name: oolab
description: Object-oriented simulation project built in Java - made for Object-Oriented Programming course in 2023

name: hex3d-playground
description: Interactive 3D playground built with Three.js & Express, exploring mechanics like raycasting, texturing, bump mapping and skyboxes on a hex-based map - made for Client Applications course in 2020

name: Minesweeper
description: Minesweeper clone with a classic Windows aesthetic, using browser Cookie API for saving leaderboard - made for Client Applications course in 2019

name: Snake
description: Snake game built in vanilla JavaScript - made for Client Applications course in 2019

name: Marbles
description: Humorous marble game built in pure TypeScript with Webpack - made for Client Applications course in 2020

name: CineFlix
description: Cinema ticket reservation system with a custom CMS, built with React & PHP/MySQL - made for Server Applications course in 2020

name: pacman-the-poor-map-editor
description: Canvas-based map editor for pacman-the-poor-game, supporting custom level design - made for Client Applications course in 2020

name: pacman-the-poor-game
description: Pacman clone built in vanilla JavaScript with Canvas API and A* pathfinding for ghost AI - designed to showcase maps from pacman-the-poor-map-editor, made for Client Applications course in 2020

name: This portfolio
description: The site you're looking at right now - built with React, Vite & styled-components
